title: How to find folder_id if I want to create a board in a folder
excerpt: Hi, I wan to create a board in a folder by API Boards, where to find the folder_id? folder should also have “name” attribute, is there a query I can get folder name and id?

posts.author: OktaDev (Run Zeng)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, I wan to create a board in a folder by API Boards, where to find the folder_id? folder should also have “name” attribute, is there a query I can get folder name and id?

posts.author: Marc_Furberg (Marc Furberg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Okta,

I also tried to find a folder by API, but unsuccessfully, there is no query to get find a folder by name)

i’m interested in if you have the answer !

Marc

posts.author: OktaDev (Run Zeng)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Marc_Furberg,

Yes, API can’t find folder ID. Currently, I activated developer mode, then click the 3-dots on the folder, then you can see the folder ID in grey color.

This is the official video how to activate developer mode:

monday API docs
